title: hieracium umbellatum subsp. umbellatum
intro: Hieracium umbellatum subsp. umbellatum, also known as Hawkweed or Hieracium, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant's medicinal properties include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium umbellatum subsp. umbellatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
